title: Senior Software Engineer - Samsung R&D India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Samsung R&D India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Samsung R&D India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Gurgaon operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Samsung R&D India:
Samsung R&D India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Samsung R&D India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
